headline: BD Gains FDA Clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL Surgical Irrigation System
summary: BDX wins FDA 510(k) clearance for Surgiphor 1000mL antimicrobial irrigation system, expanding its surgical irrigation portfolio with a powered lavage option.

headline: Balloon Catheter Market Competitive Landscape Report 2025: Key Players Analysis, Profiles, Strategic Developments, Mergers, Product Innovations, Revenue Insights, and Future Forecasts to 2033
summary: The Balloon Catheter market is projected to grow from $5.04 Billion in 2025 to $8.51 Billion by 2033, driven by a CAGR of 6.75%. This growth stems from increased cardiovascular disease cases and demand for minimally invasive surgeries. Advancements in drug-eluting and specialty balloons enhance procedures like angioplasty. Key players include Abbott, Becton Dickinson, and Teleflex. Aging populations and healthcare investments fuel market expansion, despite challenges like product recalls. Contin

headline: Blood Collection Devices (Tubes, Needles & Syringes, Blood Bags, Monitors) Market - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The global blood collection devices market is set to grow from USD 9.13 billion in 2025 to USD 13.02 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 7.4%. Factors driving market growth include the increasing prevalence of infectious, chronic, and lifestyle-related conditions, and expansion of healthcare infrastructure, enhancing demand for reliable blood testing. The automated blood collection segment is anticipated to rise rapidly, attributed to demands for safer procedures. North America led the market in 202
